summary: Patched generic `search` live fallback to hit /bzk/locatieserver/search/v3_1/free instead of /kadaster/location-api/v1/search.
reason: Multi-spec generation picked the Kadaster /search endpoint as the live-fallback URL for the generic search command, but that endpoint requires bracketed per-collection opt-in syntax (`?<col>[version]=1`) that the generic generated path can't construct. Switching the fallback to Locatieserver /free makes search work without forcing users into the OGC opt-in shape; users wanting OGC search use `features search` directly.
